sn35.70:1.1: Atha kho āyasmā upavāṇo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami … pe … ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā upavāṇo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "‘sandiṭṭhiko dhammo, sandiṭṭhiko dhammo’ti, bhante, vuccati. Kittāvatā nu kho, bhante, sandiṭṭhiko dhammo hoti, akāliko ehipassiko opaneyyiko paccattaṁ veditabbo viññūhī"ti?
